commands.review_summary:
This PR resolves `media://inbound/...` in the host agent read path before workspace guard/base read execution and adds custom-workspace regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +21, Tests +56. Total +77 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection and the linked report, though I did not run the Windows Telegram path. Current main passes `media://inbound/<id>` through the host read path unnormalized, and the PR proof exercises the fixed real read tool path.
